title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Shyaway

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Shyaway
jsonLd.description:
Shyaway invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shyaway:
Shyaway is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shyaway!
